title: The Venue
name: Chapel of St. Saviour
blurb: A nineteenth-century stone chapel set within a private garden, connected by a cloister to the ballroom — the same roof from vows to last dance.

dressCode.title: Black tie & traditional
dressCode.body: Floor-length, agbada, gele, dinner jacket. Ivory, emerald, oxblood, gold — the house palette.

children.title: An adults-only celebration
children.body: With the warm exception of those listed on your invitation.
